stories.headline: China test-fires submarine-launched ballistic missile into Pacific, angering neighbors
stories.summary: A PLA Navy submarine launched a strategic missile with a dummy warhead into the South Pacific nuclear-free zone, drawing protests from Australia, New Zealand and Japan, hours after an Australia-Fiji defence pact.

stories.headline: Russia hits Kyiv with mass missile-and-drone barrage, killing at least 14
stories.summary: Russia struck Kyiv with ballistic, cruise and hypersonic missiles and hundreds of drones overnight, killing at least 14 in the second mass strike in four days.

stories.headline: Bern weighs making tips tax-free; tax-law professors warn of abuse
stories.summary: A federal proposal to exempt gratuities from tax draws warnings that it could be gamed by higher earners.

stories.headline: New German app aims to ease cross-border shopping for Swiss residents
stories.summary: A German app digitises VAT-refund paperwork for Swiss shoppers crossing the border.

stories.headline: NATO leaders convene in Ankara as Trump prepares to meet Zelensky
stories.summary: The 2026 NATO summit opens in Ankara 7-8 July with a draft declaration pledging 70 billion euros for Ukraine and a planned Trump-Zelensky meeting.

stories.headline: Iran holds largest day of Khamenei funeral procession; successor Mojtaba still unseen
stories.summary: Millions gathered in Tehran for the main procession of assassinated Supreme Leader Ali Khamenei; his named successor Mojtaba has not appeared publicly. Burial set for 9 July in Mashhad.

stories.headline: At least 19 killed in Sri Lanka prison clashes
stories.summary: Violence at the Negombo prison over two days left at least 19 dead and more than 100 wounded.

stories.headline: Impeachment trial of Philippines Vice-President Sara Duterte begins
stories.summary: The Philippine Senate opened the impeachment trial of VP Sara Duterte.

stories.headline: Federal Council tours canton Vaud on annual course d'école
stories.summary: The seven-member Federal Council concluded its two-day summer excursion through Vaud (La Broye, La Cote, Chablais) hosted by President Parmelin, with a Rhone cruise briefing on the third Rhone correction flood project.

stories.headline: Trump offers to help end Ukraine war in long Putin call
stories.summary: In a US-initiated 85-minute call, Trump offered mediation on Ukraine and said envoys Witkoff and Kushner are ready to travel to Moscow, per the Kremlin readout.

stories.headline: AfD re-elects Weidel and Chrupalla at Erfurt congress amid protests
stories.summary: At its 17th federal congress in Erfurt the AfD re-elected Alice Weidel (81.3%) and Tino Chrupalla (70.1%) as co-leaders despite tens of thousands of protesters attempting blockades.

stories.headline: Swiss army suspects espionage after drone swarms over Jassbach and Meiringen
stories.summary: Unidentified drones flew in formation over the Jassbach cyber-defence barracks and the Meiringen F-35 air base; army chief Roos says he has no idea who is behind it and no criminal investigation has been opened.

stories.headline: US marks 250th anniversary with storm-delayed Trump speech
stories.summary: The United States celebrated its 250th independence anniversary on July 4 with nationwide events and a storm-delayed Trump speech, while white nationalists marched near Washington.

stories.headline: Rear Lötschental reachable again as Postauto returns to Fafleralp a year after Blatten rockslide
stories.summary: Bus service to the Fafleralp resumed on a new emergency road with a glacier warning traffic-light system a year after the Blatten landslide; the valley's largest hotel reopened.

stories.headline: One transformer layer can match full-parameter RL training
stories.summary: A layer-wise study finds RL post-training gains concentrate in a single middle layer.

stories.headline: Swiss labour market added ~300,000 jobs in five years, driven by foreign workers
stories.summary: A federal statistics office review of Q4 2020-Q4 2025 found employment at a record 5.4-5.5 million, with growth overwhelmingly from foreign workers as vacancies decline.

stories.headline: Trump warns of 'communist menace' in Mount Rushmore speech opening America's 250th year
stories.summary: At Mount Rushmore ahead of July 4, Trump praised the military and warned of a communist threat tied to immigration, framing it for the November midterms.

stories.headline: A hippocampus for linear attention gives sub-quadratic models exact recall
stories.summary: HOLA adds a small exact KV memory to a linear-attention model and beats a Transformer at 340M.

stories.headline: Fixing RLVR's side effects with human demonstrations and an adversarial discriminator
stories.summary: Adds a learned reward for un-verifiable qualities to preserve accuracy without reward hacking.

stories.headline: Lynx overlaps KV-cache transfer with decoding via bit-plane speculation
stories.summary: Splits the KV cache into anchor and residual streams to start decoding before full precision arrives.

stories.headline: Basel's 150-year-old Schiesser textile house faces closure
stories.summary: The traditional Basel underwear and knitwear firm Schiesser is reported to be on the brink of shutting down after more than 150 years.

stories.headline: Coordinated attacks hit five Malian towns, including a base shared by army and Russian troops
stories.summary: Tuareg-led FLA fighters and others attacked Aguelhok, Anefis, Gao, Sevare and Kenieroba at dawn, including a northern town where Malian and Russian forces are based.

stories.headline: Saudi-led coalition threatens 'unprecedented' force after Iranian plane lands in Sanaa
stories.summary: The coalition warned of a forceful response after Houthis blocked Saudi warplanes and an Iranian civilian flight landed in Sanaa for the first time in about a decade.

stories.headline: AfD party congress opens in Erfurt amid mass protests
stories.summary: Germany's AfD began its party congress in Erfurt as around 20,000 people demonstrated and attempted blockades.

stories.headline: Evidence-state rewards give dense credit for long-context reasoning
stories.summary: Maven rewards per-action edits to an editable evidence memory.

stories.headline: Conditional co-ablation recovers hidden self-repair backups in transformer circuits
stories.summary: CoAx exposes backup heads that single-unit ablation scores miss.

stories.headline: WorldSample makes real-robot RL data-efficient with a grounded world model
stories.summary: Policy-Paced Learning filters synthetic transitions to avoid value overestimation.

stories.headline: Learning the support bounds for a categorical RL critic
stories.summary: Jointly learns value-histogram support with the value function, removing a fixed hyperparameter.

stories.headline: Expander sparse autoencoders make interpretability dictionaries far cheaper
stories.summary: Constrains the SAE decoder to an expander-graph mask, cutting stored values hundreds-fold.

stories.headline: Log_b quantization places bit levels logarithmically to fit heavy-tailed weights
stories.summary: Distribution-aware 4-bit quantization beats linear quantization at tensor granularity.

stories.headline: A fast wavelet-plus-t-test anomaly detector beats learned baselines on 343 datasets
stories.summary: Unsupervised time-series anomaly detection with a statistical decision rule.

stories.headline: Smoking-gun evidence that big black holes are built from smaller ones
stories.summary: GWTC-5's high-spin black holes match predicted merger remnants of the low-spin population.

stories.headline: A sign-problem-free simulation of deconfined criticality between magnetism and superconductivity
stories.summary: Quantum Monte Carlo finds a continuous AFM-to-d-wave-SC transition via partons.

stories.headline: A nickel-vacancy diamond qubit with all-optical control and millisecond memory
stories.summary: NiV center reaches 1.27ms coherence at 1.65K with laser-only dynamical decoupling.

stories.headline: Tightest test yet that neutrino mixing is unitary, from 8 years of IceCube
stories.summary: No deviation from unitary 3x3 mixing; record bound on non-unitarity parameter.

stories.headline: Quantum noncommutativity uniquely determines relative entropy
stories.summary: Additivity plus optimal-measurement betting odds single out Umegaki relative entropy.

stories.headline: Oldest Milky Way stars put the universe at 13.7 billion years, straining Hubble-tension fixes
stories.summary: 155,600 old metal-poor stars give an age matching standard LCDM, disfavoring early-universe fixes.

stories.headline: Two long-standing matroid conjectures fall in a four-page note
stories.summary: Larson disproves White's conjecture and Mason's log-concavity conjecture.

stories.headline: Explicit Gross-Zagier formula completes the 4,7 cases of Sylvester's cube-sum conjecture
stories.summary: Certifies constructed CM points are non-torsion for primes 4,7 mod 9.

stories.headline: DeepSeek ships fp8 DSpark quantized editions of V4
stories.summary: Pro ~889B and Flash ~165B fp8 builds for cheaper serving, MIT license.

stories.headline: Google releases a tabular foundation model for zero-shot table prediction
stories.summary: tabfm does in-context classification/regression on new tables without task training.

stories.headline: Anthropic launches Claude Sonnet 5 with a new tokenizer that lifts effective cost
stories.summary: Near-Opus performance, 1M context, but ~30-40% more tokens for English/code.

stories.headline: SpudCell: a chemically defined synthetic cell completes a full cell cycle
stories.summary: A from-scratch cell of 150-200 molecule types grows, replicates, divides over ~5 generations.

stories.headline: Germline-targeting vaccines elicit broadly neutralizing HIV antibodies in primates
stories.summary: Staged priming/boosting drives apex-directed bnAbs in non-human primates.

stories.headline: COMPASS foundation model predicts cancer immunotherapy response across tumor types
stories.summary: Predicts immunotherapy benefit from bulk tumor transcriptomes, generalizing across cancers.

stories.headline: Splice-switching small molecule CP3 cuts prion protein by 70 percent
stories.summary: Risdiplam-derived molecule activates a cryptic PRNP exon to degrade its mRNA.

stories.headline: Engineered base editor permanently corrects familial dysautonomia mutation
stories.summary: Cytosine base editor restores ELP1 splicing with ~70% correction in human cells.

stories.headline: A virtual yeast models a eukaryotic cell with an AI agent
stories.summary: Nature paper on an AI-driven virtual eukaryotic cell for in-silico perturbation prediction.

stories.headline: Netflix GenPage generates a personalized homepage autoregressively
stories.summary: Single generative model builds the page one element at a time versus pipeline-of-rankers.

stories.headline: 'It's hard to eval' is a product smell
stories.summary: Hamel Husain argues eval difficulty signals a product-design problem, not an evals problem.

stories.headline: JWST keeps breaking cosmological models
stories.summary: Quanta surveys early black holes, mature galaxies, and little red dots that theory did not predict.

stories.headline: Understand to participate: cognitive debt with coding agents
stories.summary: Willison relays Litt's framing that collaborating with coding agents requires deep code understanding.

stories.headline: Iran's Supreme Leader Khamenei dies; state funeral in Tehran
stories.summary: Death follows a war and a just-signed Iran-US framework accord.

stories.headline: Lie-detector oversight of LLMs scales the right way: undetected deception falls from 34% to 14% as models grow from 1B to 405B parameters
stories.summary: SOLiD lie-detector oversight scales favorably to 405B; undetected deception drops and human labelers can be removed from fine-tuning.

stories.headline: Vaud minister Nuria Gorrite will not seek re-election in 2027
stories.summary: After 15 years in Vaud's cantonal government, Socialist Nuria Gorrite announced she will not run for a fourth term in February 2027.

stories.headline: A character-level jailbreak exploits how tokenizers chop up safety words, flipping refusals on 80-100% of blocked prompts
stories.summary: BPE sub-word fragmentation of safety words yields a jailbreak that flips refusals across five model families.

stories.headline: NightVision recovers an LLM's hidden dimension, depth, and parameter count through today's single-logit APIs
stories.summary: Black-box attack estimates architectural parameters of commercial LLMs under restrictive single-logit APIs.

stories.headline: Kara compresses the KV cache with a sliding window to speed up long-reasoning serving
stories.summary: Sliding-window KV cache compression improves reasoning-LLM serving throughput without accuracy cliffs.

stories.headline: SNB says Swiss banks including UBS well-capitalized; UBS calls report misleading
stories.summary: SNB's 2026 Financial Stability Report found UBS can meet proposed 2030 capital rules; UBS pushed back, calling the report misleading.

stories.headline: Khamenei's state funeral begins in Tehran with 100+ countries represented
stories.summary: Iran opened a seven-day state funeral for slain Supreme Leader Ali Khamenei, killed Feb 28 in a US-Israeli strike, with delegations from over 100 countries.

stories.headline: The execution substrate is a hidden tax on coding-agent RL: up to 110x variation in cold-start latency
stories.summary: Comparative study of four execution substrates for coding-agent RL finds large infrastructure overheads.

stories.headline: Procedural Memory Distillation reuses cross-episode RL signals that per-episode updates throw away
stories.summary: PMD distills cross-episode rollout information into policy weights during RLVR.

stories.headline: Token Geometry: a kilobyte-scale optimizer for embedding tables that undercuts Adam's memory
stories.summary: Ember optimizer exploits embedding/LM-head gradient geometry to cut optimizer VRAM.

stories.headline: A three-term scaling law splits training data into steps and batch size to recover optimal batch size
stories.summary: New scaling law jointly models model size, training steps and batch size; robustly fit from fewer runs.

stories.headline: CreativityNeuro steers model weights to boost divergent thinking and blunt mode collapse
stories.summary: Data-free contrastive weight steering improves LLM creativity on DAT and human-rated alternative-uses tasks.

stories.headline: Anthropic ships Claude Sonnet 5, its most agentic Sonnet yet, at performance close to Opus 4.8 but lower cost
stories.summary: Claude Sonnet 5 released as most agentic Sonnet yet, near Opus 4.8 performance at lower price.

stories.headline: Anthropic publishes an early AI-jailbreak severity framework and details Fable 5's cyber safeguards
stories.summary: Anthropic details Fable 5 cybersecurity safety classifiers and proposes an AI jailbreak severity framework with Glasswing partners.

stories.headline: Anthropic launches Claude Science, a customizable AI workbench for scientists
stories.summary: Claude Science, a customizable AI workbench for scientific research, released.

stories.headline: OpenAI's GeneBench-Pro tests whether AI agents can make judgment calls in computational biology
stories.summary: GeneBench-Pro is a research-level benchmark measuring higher-order judgment in genomics and translational medicine tasks.

stories.headline: Ticino freezes ~50M CHF in tax rebates owed to Italy's border communes
stories.summary: Ticino's government partially suspended tax retrocessions to Lombardy amid a frontier-worker health-tax dispute; Bern regrets the move, Italy protested.

stories.headline: Kyiv death toll from Russia's overnight barrage rises to at least 30; Ukraine strikes back
stories.summary: Toll from the July 1-2 Russian barrage (74 missiles, 496 drones) rose to 30+ killed; Ukraine hit Russian border regions on July 3.

stories.headline: Canada's Carney secures BC deal for west-coast oil pipeline to reach Asia
stories.summary: PM Carney reached an investment agreement with British Columbia for a 1M-barrel/day Alberta-to-Pacific pipeline to cut dependence on the US market.

stories.headline: Man dies after self-immolating with a Tibetan flag outside UN in New York
stories.summary: A Tibetan advocate set himself on fire outside UN headquarters in New York and was pronounced dead, protesting China's rule over Tibet.

stories.headline: Federal social-insurance projections: IV/AI reserves could vanish by 2031, IV heading for 800M-franc deficit
stories.summary: Federal Social Insurance Office's updated projections warn IV reserves could disappear by 2031 and AVS needs durable financing for the 13th pension.

stories.headline: EFTA and Vietnam sign comprehensive free-trade agreement
stories.summary: Switzerland, Iceland, Liechtenstein and Norway concluded an FTA with Vietnam abolishing tariffs on industrial goods and fish.

stories.headline: Vaud: three PLR cantonal ministers Luisier, Moret and Borloz to seek re-election in 2027
stories.summary: The three Vaud Conseil d'Etat members from the PLR announced they will run again in the 2027 cantonal elections.

stories.headline: Heatwave: absolute fire bans imposed in Valais and other cantons amid record June
stories.summary: Swiss cantons impose total open-fire bans as heatwave and drought raise wildfire risk.

stories.headline: Russia launches largest strike yet on Kyiv, killing at least 21
stories.summary: Russia fired ~74 missiles and 496 drones at Kyiv in an 11-hour assault, killing 21 and injuring 85.

stories.headline: Explosive device kills at least six in central Damascus cafe
stories.summary: A blast in a cafe near the Palace of Justice in Damascus killed at least six and wounded 22.

stories.headline: US June job growth cools sharply to 57,000; unemployment 4.2%
stories.summary: Nonfarm payrolls rose just 57,000 in June, below forecasts, with leisure/hospitality shedding 61,000 jobs.
